code: @Manual{,   title = {ggsegDKwm: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem},   author = {Giuseppe Barisano},   year = {2026},   note = {R package version 0.0.1},   url = {https://github.com/gbarisano/ggsegDKwm}, }

what: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Desikan-Killiany white-matter parcellation atlas ggseg ecosystem. ggsegDKwm provides Desikan-Killiany white-matter parcellation (wmparc, cortical labels projected white matter) together basal-ganglia structures (caudate, putamen, pallidum, thalamus) ggseg_atlas object axial slice views, symmetric fsaverage_sym template space. Cortical grey matter merged single background label.

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
code: # with pak (recommended — resolves ggsegverse dependencies automatically) # install.packages("pak") pak::pak("gbarisano/ggsegDKwm")  # or with remotes # remotes::install_github("gbarisano/ggsegDKwm")

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Plot full atlas, keeping atlas’s colour palette:  atlas ships several axial views. List : Colour regions data joining region label, exactly built-ggseg atlases.
code: library(ggseg) library(ggsegDKwm) library(ggplot2)  ggplot() +   geom_brain(atlas = dkwm(), aes(fill = label), show.legend = FALSE) +   scale_fill_manual(values = dkwm()$palette, na.value = "grey") +   theme_void() ggseg.formats::atlas_views(dkwm()) #> [1] "axial_09" "axial_11" "axial_13" "axial_15" "axial_18" "axial_21" "axial_24"

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Space: symmetric fsaverage_sym FreeSurfer template Regions: Desikan-Killiany white-matter parcels (wm-lh-*, wm-rh-*), basal ganglia (caudate, putamen, pallidum, thalamus), cortical grey matter merged single background label Views: axial slices

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the ggsegverse Ecosystem
text: Desikan RS, Ségonne F, Fischl B, et al. (2006). automated labeling system subdividing human cerebral cortex MRI scans gyral based regions interest. NeuroImage, 31(3):968-980. https://doi.org/10.1016/j.neuroimage.2006.01.021

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas (axial) — dkwm
text: Brain atlas containing Desikan-Killiany white-matter parcellation ('wmparc', cortical labels projected white matter) together basal-ganglia structures (caudate, putamen, pallidum, thalamus), symmetric 'fsaverage_sym' template space. Cortical grey matter merged single background label. Provides 2D polygon geometry axial slice views use ggseg::geom_brain().

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas (axial) — dkwm
text: Desikan RS, et al. (2006). automated labeling system subdividing human cerebral cortex MRI scans gyral based regions interest. NeuroImage, 31(3):968-980. doi:10.1016/j.neuroimage.2006.01.021

title: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas (axial) — dkwm
code: dkwm() #>  #> ── Desikan-Killiany white matter parcellation ggseg atlas ────────────────────── #> Type: subcortical #> Regions: 40 #> Hemispheres: left, right #> Views: axial_09, axial_11, axial_13, axial_15, axial_18, axial_21, axial_24 #> Palette: ✔ #> Rendering: ✔ ggseg #> ✔ ggseg3d (meshes) #> ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #>     hemi            region                  label #> 1   left cerebral exterior Left-Cerebral-Exterior #> 2   left          thalamus          Left-Thalamus #> 3   left           caudate           Left-Caudate #> 4   left           putamen           Left-Putamen #> 5   left          pallidum          Left-Pallidum #> 6  right          thalamus         Right-Thalamus #> 7  right           caudate          Right-Caudate #> 8  right           putamen          Right-Putamen #> 9  right          pallidum         Right-Pallidum #> 10  left          bankssts         wm-lh-bankssts #> ... with 69 more rows if (FALSE) plot(dkwm()) # \dontrun{}

what: ggsegDKwm: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegDKwm-package
title: ggsegDKwm: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegDKwm-package
text: Axial Desikan-Killiany white-matter parcellation ('wmparc') together basal-ganglia structures (caudate, putamen, pallidum, thalamus), provided 'ggseg_atlas' object use 'ggseg'. Cortical grey matter merged single background label. Built symmetric 'fsaverage_sym' template space axial slice views.

title: ggsegDKwm: Desikan-Killiany White-Matter Parcellation Atlas for the 'ggsegverse' Ecosystem — ggsegDKwm-package
